# TaskFlow Pro

Collaborative Task Management SaaS built by BhogarAI Greenfield Workflow Pipeline.

## Live Deployment
- **App**: https://taskflow-pro-app.azurewebsites.net
- **API Docs**: https://taskflow-pro-app.azurewebsites.net/docs
- **Health**: https://taskflow-pro-app.azurewebsites.net/api/health

## Tech Stack
- Python 3.11 + FastAPI
- Azure App Service (B1 Linux)
- Deployed via Service Principal
